item.title: GTA 6 Pre-Orders: How to Claim Your Free GTA+ Month (and Cancel Auto-Renew)
item.description:
If you've pre-ordered Grand Theft Auto 6 , you'll get a free month of GTA+. This bonus is exclusive to GTA Online , and this guide will go over what GTA+ does, how you can redeem your code, and how you can cancel it, as GTA+ is automatically enrolled as an auto-renew subscription that you might want to remove so you're not billed unexpectedly next month.

If you've obtained your free month of GTA+, then you have until March 31, 2027, to redeem it.

How to Claim a Month of GTA+ for Pre-Ordering GTA 6

If you've pre-ordered Grand Theft Auto 6 on PlayStation or Xbox, then you can head to the GTA+ product page on the same storefront where you purchased GTA 6 . On the GTA+ product page, you will receive on-screen instructions that will take you through the redemption process , but you should see that instead of having a price tag, it's free.

GTA Online does not have cross-progression, so your free month of GTA+ will not be transferable to a different platform, like PC.

How to Cancel GTA+ on PlayStation

Once you've redeemed the GTA+ bonus, you'll have it as a subscription that will redeem next month. Thankfully, you can cancel this so that it expires 30 days after you redeemed it:

  1. Head to Settings.
  2. Click Users and Accounts.
  3. From the Accounts tab, scroll to Payment and Subscriptions.
  4. Click Subscriptions and find GTA+, where you can then cancel auto-renewal from the bottom of the screen.

How to Cancel GTA+ on Xbox

If you're on console, perform the following:

  1. Press the Xbox button.
  2. Go to Profile & System > Settings > Account > Subscriptions
  3. Choose GTA+ and then select Cancel Subscription / Turn Off Recurring Billing.

You can also cancel subscriptions for GTA+ while on an internet browser:

  1. Head to the Subscriptions | Microsoft account page (through the link provided).
  2. Once you've logged into your associated Microsoft/Xbox account, you can select Manage.
  3. You can now select Cancel Subscription. However, if you can't, then you've already done it, and instead, you'll see "Turn On Recurring Billing," which you won't want to press.

What is GTA Plus?

GTA+ is a premium membership to GTA Online , in which every month, you will be able to claim special benefits that other GTA Online players can't. This includes:

  • GTA$ 500,000 every month.
  • 15% bonus GTA$ with Shark Card purchases.
  • Monthly discounts on some in-game items.
  • Bonus GTA$ on missions and activities.
  • The Vinewood Car Club to claim free vehicles and store 100 vehicles.
  • Access to Rockstar Games titles: Grand Theft Auto 5, Grand Theft Auto Online, Red Dead Redemption, Grand Theft Auto: The Trilogy - The Definitive Edition, Bully, Grand Theft Auto: Liberty City Stories, L.A. Noire, and Grand Theft Auto: Chinatown Wars.

The benefits for GTA+ change every month, and you can check out the new month of benefits here!

Do you have any questions about GTA 6 ? You can find some useful FAQs here:

  • How Much Does GTA 6 Cost?
  • Is GTA 6 Releasing on Disc?
  • What Shops are Exclusive to the Ultimate Edition?

Grand Theft Auto 6

Follow
Followed
Action
Adventure
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Released
November 19, 2026
ESRB
Rating Pending - Likely Mature 17+
Developer(s)
Rockstar Games
Publisher(s)
Rockstar Games
8 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Genre(s)
Action, Adventure
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
If you've pre-ordered Grand Theft Auto 6 , you'll get a free month of GTA+. This bonus is exclusive to GTA Online , and this guide will go over what GTA+ does, how you can redeem your code, and how you can cancel it, as GTA+ is automatically enrolled as an auto-renew subscription that you might want to remove so you're not billed unexpectedly next month.

If you've obtained your free month of GTA+, then you have until March 31, 2027, to redeem it.

How to Claim a Month of GTA+ for Pre-Ordering GTA 6

If you've pre-ordered Grand Theft Auto 6 on PlayStation or Xbox, then you can head to the GTA+ product page on the same storefront where you purchased GTA 6 . On the GTA+ product page, you will receive on-screen instructions that will take you through the redemption process , but you should see that instead of having a price tag, it's free.

GTA Online does not have cross-progression, so your free month of GTA+ will not be transferable to a different platform, like PC.

How to Cancel GTA+ on PlayStation

Once you've redeemed the GTA+ bonus, you'll have it as a subscription that will redeem next month. Thankfully, you can cancel this so that it expires 30 days after you redeemed it:

  1. Head to Settings.
  2. Click Users and Accounts.
  3. From the Accounts tab, scroll to Payment and Subscriptions.
  4. Click Subscriptions and find GTA+, where you can then cancel auto-renewal from the bottom of the screen.

How to Cancel GTA+ on Xbox

If you're on console, perform the following:

  1. Press the Xbox button.
  2. Go to Profile & System > Settings > Account > Subscriptions
  3. Choose GTA+ and then select Cancel Subscription / Turn Off Recurring Billing.

You can also cancel subscriptions for GTA+ while on an internet browser:

  1. Head to the Subscriptions | Microsoft account page (through the link provided).
  2. Once you've logged into your associated Microsoft/Xbox account, you can select Manage.
  3. You can now select Cancel Subscription. However, if you can't, then you've already done it, and instead, you'll see "Turn On Recurring Billing," which you won't want to press.

What is GTA Plus?

GTA+ is a premium membership to GTA Online , in which every month, you will be able to claim special benefits that other GTA Online players can't. This includes:

  • GTA$ 500,000 every month.
  • 15% bonus GTA$ with Shark Card purchases.
  • Monthly discounts on some in-game items.
  • Bonus GTA$ on missions and activities.
  • The Vinewood Car Club to claim free vehicles and store 100 vehicles.
  • Access to Rockstar Games titles: Grand Theft Auto 5, Grand Theft Auto Online, Red Dead Redemption, Grand Theft Auto: The Trilogy - The Definitive Edition, Bully, Grand Theft Auto: Liberty City Stories, L.A. Noire, and Grand Theft Auto: Chinatown Wars.

The benefits for GTA+ change every month, and you can check out the new month of benefits here!

Do you have any questions about GTA 6 ? You can find some useful FAQs here:

  • How Much Does GTA 6 Cost?
  • Is GTA 6 Releasing on Disc?
  • What Shops are Exclusive to the Ultimate Edition?

Grand Theft Auto 6

item.title: GTA 6 PlayStation Store Page Gets Official Update
item.description:
The PlayStation Store page for Grand Theft Auto 6 was updated to include several features that PS5 users should note down ahead of the game's November launch. The store page update went live just hours before GTA 6 pre-orders were opened to the public on the PlayStation Store and other storefronts.

The day before the game's pre-order window opened up, Rockstar Games shared how much GTA 6 will cost at launch. The standard version of GTA 6 will start at $79.99. While GTA 6 is more expensive than most PS5 titles, the standard edition will not cross the $100 threshold as originally believed. However, Grand Theft Auto 6: Ultimate Edition will set fans back $99.99 and will include some exclusive weapons and outfits for players to equip as they see fit. GTA 6 copies sold on the PlayStation Store before November 20 will also include the Vintage Vice City DLC pack and a free month of GTA+ to use in GTA Online . A recurring subscription to GTA+ currently costs $7.99 per month before taxes and fees are applied.

GTA 6's PlayStation Store Page Includes Features Players Should Note Down

With Rockstar Games and Sony teaming up to market GTA 6 on the PS5, the PlayStation Store listing for the game has been updated ahead of the game's November 19 launch. Before the changes, the PlayStation Store page for GTA 6 simply showed some screenshots from the game, along with the ESRB's pending rating labels and some frequently asked questions. Along with the option to pre-order GTA 6 , prospective buyers can now note down some of the features that should be available on day one.

Scratch & Peek

Identify the cover art while scratching off as little foil as possible.

0 Points
Medium
0 %
Scratch to reveal
Low reveal = bigger bonus
0 / 10

Results

0

High Score: 0

—

More Games
Scratch & Peek Identify the cover art while scratching off as little foil as possible.
EasyMediumHardPermadeath
0 Points
Medium
0 %
Scratch to reveal
Low reveal = bigger bonus
0 / 10
Results
0
High Score: 0 —
More Games

PlayStation users can utilize Remote Play when playing GTA 6 , meaning that it can be streamed via a connected PlayStation Portal handheld device, or via a supported PC or mobile device. Grand Theft Auto 6 will also take advantage of the exclusive features of the PS5's DualSense wireless controller. GTA 6 will utilize the DualSense's integrated speaker for specific sound effects, along with haptic feedback that players will feel as they explore Vice City and the state of Leonida. PS5 users with supported speakers or a headset can also take advantage of Sony's Tempest 3D audio technology when playing GTA 6 .

Additionally, the PlayStation Store page stated that GTA 6 will be enhanced for the PS5 Pro console. However, it is currently unclear which PS5 Pro features, such as PSSR upscaling and improved ray tracing, will be utilized by GTA 6 . It is also unclear what framerates GTA 6 will run at on the base PS5 and on Xbox Series X/S consoles as of this writing. Given that the PS5 Pro is currently priced at $899, it remains to be seen how many GTA 6 players will take advantage of the PS5 Pro's exclusive features.

Test your knowledge.

Sign in to claim your place on the leaderboard!

Leaderboard
No scores yet. Be the first.
1/10

Question text goes here?

Results

0 Points

—

Sign in to claim your place on the leaderboard!

Leaderboard
No scores yet. Be the first.

Pre-orders for GTA 6 are now live as of June 25, nearly five months before the game's anticipated arrival. Given that GTA 6 is projected to be a record-breaking game launch come November 19, time will tell how many copies will be sold via the PlayStation Store.

Grand Theft Auto 6

Followed
Action
Adventure
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Released
November 19, 2026
ESRB
Rating Pending - Likely Mature 17+
Developer(s)
Rockstar Games
Publisher(s)
Rockstar Games
8 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Genre(s)
Action, Adventure
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
The PlayStation Store page for Grand Theft Auto 6 was updated to include several features that PS5 users should note down ahead of the game's November launch. The store page update went live just hours before GTA 6 pre-orders were opened to the public on the PlayStation Store and other storefronts.

The day before the game's pre-order window opened up, Rockstar Games shared how much GTA 6 will cost at launch. The standard version of GTA 6 will start at $79.99. While GTA 6 is more expensive than most PS5 titles, the standard edition will not cross the $100 threshold as originally believed. However, Grand Theft Auto 6: Ultimate Edition will set fans back $99.99 and will include some exclusive weapons and outfits for players to equip as they see fit. GTA 6 copies sold on the PlayStation Store before November 20 will also include the Vintage Vice City DLC pack and a free month of GTA+ to use in GTA Online . A recurring subscription to GTA+ currently costs $7.99 per month before taxes and fees are applied.

GTA 6's PlayStation Store Page Includes Features Players Should Note Down

With Rockstar Games and Sony teaming up to market GTA 6 on the PS5, the PlayStation Store listing for the game has been updated ahead of the game's November 19 launch. Before the changes, the PlayStation Store page for GTA 6 simply showed some screenshots from the game, along with the ESRB's pending rating labels and some frequently asked questions. Along with the option to pre-order GTA 6 , prospective buyers can now note down some of the features that should be available on day one.

PlayStation users can utilize Remote Play when playing GTA 6 , meaning that it can be streamed via a connected PlayStation Portal handheld device, or via a supported PC or mobile device. Grand Theft Auto 6 will also take advantage of the exclusive features of the PS5's DualSense wireless controller. GTA 6 will utilize the DualSense's integrated speaker for specific sound effects, along with haptic feedback that players will feel as they explore Vice City and the state of Leonida. PS5 users with supported speakers or a headset can also take advantage of Sony's Tempest 3D audio technology when playing GTA 6 .

Additionally, the PlayStation Store page stated that GTA 6 will be enhanced for the PS5 Pro console. However, it is currently unclear which PS5 Pro features, such as PSSR upscaling and improved ray tracing, will be utilized by GTA 6 . It is also unclear what framerates GTA 6 will run at on the base PS5 and on Xbox Series X/S consoles as of this writing. Given that the PS5 Pro is currently priced at $899, it remains to be seen how many GTA 6 players will take advantage of the PS5 Pro's exclusive features.

item.title: Games So Good They Ruined Their Genre For Me
item.description:
Every genre has a few shining stars that stand above the rest, demonstrating a level of excellence that may never be reached again. Furthermore, in some cases, these incredible games are so much better and more engaging than their genre contemporaries that the rest of the space feels lackluster by comparison.

This phenomenon doesn't happen with every 10/10 game, nor with every single player, but it certainly exists and can make certain games struggle to really stick the landing. That's not to say that the other games are bad by any stretch; it just means that the bar set is so high that everything else around it feels like it is perpetually grasping at straws, trying to fight a simply unwinnable battle.

Rearrange the covers into the correct US release order.

Your Order

Results

—

—

—

More Games
Rearrange the covers into the correct US release order.
Easy (5)Medium (7)Hard (10)

Your Order

Results

—
— —
More Games

Hades

Roguelikes Have Never Felt The Same

  • Fast combat with a distinctive art style.
  • Many copycat games that don't capture the same energy.

Hades has long reigned as the king of the roguelikes, and it has retained its throne through gameplay and visual design alone. You play as Zagreus, the son of Hades, and are thrown into the Underworld, tasked with charging head-on into everything from demons to demigods, all the way up until a final confrontation with your titular father.

I think the main reason other roguelikes similar to Hades struggle to live up to it is their lack of innovation and the sheer satisfaction the game offers. Every swing feels so smooth, and every blow lands with such weight that even the most well-polished games in the genre can barely hold a flame to the deity-infused action of Hades .

The Legend Of Zelda: Breath Of The Wild

Breaking The Biggest Genre Around

  • Open-world exploration on another level.
  • Makes other games feel too samey.

Breath of the Wild brought Zelda back in the most extravagant way possible and also fundamentally altered the course of the open-world genre forever. Hyrule is beautiful and awe-inspiring, with little to no limits on where you can go or how you explore it, meaning that distant landmarks and structures across the landscape become the main sources of guidance in your quest to stop Ganon.

The game's blueprint has since been used to great effect by other industry titans like Elden Ring , but when compared to more old-fashioned open-world games, the excitement and joy are never as high. I have no problem playing a more laid-back game that isn't as focused on this kind of organic style of gameplay, yet there is always a thought in the back of my mind that wishes I were back playing BotW for the very first time.

Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice

Melee Combat Perfected

  • Fundamentally changed soulslike combat.
  • Introduced a new a parry-focused approach.

Soulslike gameplay had already made a huge shift in how melee combat games were designed, and Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice took yet another leap that would eclipse everything before it entirely. It's just you and the blade, and with next to no handholding, your path throughout the story is solely dependent on whether you can "get good" and become a master of deflects.

I consider the gameplay in Sekiro to be among the best the gaming world has ever produced. Whenever I jump around to other soulslikes or even hack-and-slash games, there is an inescapable void that can only be filled by yet another duel with Genichiro. Also, when it comes to Eastern-inspired action games, whenever a new trailer drops or a new title is released, many players are quick to compare it to Sekiro , and to ultimately say that the new product is far from the magnum opus that FromSoftware created.

Baldur's Gate 3

The Peak Of RPGs

  • Unmatched role-playing depth.
  • Cinematic presentation with turn-based gameplay.

Baldur's Gate 3 introduced a whole generation of players to the world of CRPGs and gave countless longtime fans a new favorite game that they could easily get lost in for hundreds of hours. Those opening scenes will forever be among my most memorable. As the world opened up, I quickly realized I was experiencing something special firsthand that was unlike anything I had seen in the RPG genre.

The combination of cinematic cutscenes and role-playing freedom ensures that you are constantly immersed from start to finish, and even if you manage to venture all the way to the credits, there are always dozens of more paths to explore in a second, third, or fourth playthrough. As someone who has been a longtime turn-based RPG fan, I find it hard to imagine another game coming along and matching the quality of BG3 , unless Larian is capable of actual witchcraft with the release of the next Divinity .

DOOM Eternal

Singleplayer Shooter Excellence

  • Top-tier boomer shooter design.
  • Faster and more impactful than almost every other release after it.

DOOM Eternal is easily the best game in the entire franchise, and I also think that within the wider shooter genre, it is the best single-player FPS out there. The gunplay is unreal, spearheaded by the constant need to swap weapons and tactically use specific firearms to take down various demons, adding an extra layer of rhythm to an already momentum-heavy game.

The set pieces are another component that really wows you throughout your journey into hell, with entire cities and castles towering above you, each housing an endless swarm of enemies ready to be annihilated. Though The Dark Ages brings a lot of great elements to the series, I still think that if you are looking for a single-player shooter to completely blow everything else out of the water, then no other game makes sense than Eternal .

Hollow Knight

Might As Well Be Called "Knightvania" At This Point

  • The new king of Metroidvanias.
  • Aesthetics and gameplay changed the course of the genre.

Metroidvanias have evolved a lot over the years, going from simple platformers to mind-blowing environments coated in beauty, and the game that has made the biggest jump of them all is Hollow Knight . It is impossible to talk about all the good things the game has to offer. It doesn't matter if you are looking at the combat, movement, or the universe itself; every single element is flawless from start to finish.

Additionally, the game has had such a big influence on the genre that many other developers are attempting to recreate both the art style and gameplay approach, though very few have hit the same benchmark. For me, the game is actually hard to recommend, as once all is said and done, the sensation of emptiness is beyond suffocating. Thankfully, we finally have Silksong to enjoy, even if it doesn't quite live up to its predecessor's name.

Counter-Strike

Igniting A Tactical Wave

  • Birthed a new kind of shooter.
  • Follow-ups that retained the throne.

FPS games have always been split into many different categories, and tactical shooters have always been among the biggest. However, no matter how many new games launch and how much innovation is brought to the table, it is impossible to topple the titan that is Counter-Strike .

The original game pioneered the tactical genre as it exists today, and even after several iterations and new releases, that initial gameplay loop and design philosophy still exists in CS2 . I have bounced around from Valorant to Rainbow 6 to smaller releases that have come and gone, but they are always missing something that can only be produced by Valve's competitive masterpiece.
item.content:encoded:
Every genre has a few shining stars that stand above the rest, demonstrating a level of excellence that may never be reached again. Furthermore, in some cases, these incredible games are so much better and more engaging than their genre contemporaries that the rest of the space feels lackluster by comparison.

This phenomenon doesn't happen with every 10/10 game, nor with every single player, but it certainly exists and can make certain games struggle to really stick the landing. That's not to say that the other games are bad by any stretch; it just means that the bar set is so high that everything else around it feels like it is perpetually grasping at straws, trying to fight a simply unwinnable battle.

  • Many copycat games that don't capture the same energy.

Hades has long reigned as the king of the roguelikes, and it has retained its throne through gameplay and visual design alone. You play as Zagreus, the son of Hades, and are thrown into the Underworld, tasked with charging head-on into everything from demons to demigods, all the way up until a final confrontation with your titular father.

I think the main reason other roguelikes similar to Hades struggle to live up to it is their lack of innovation and the sheer satisfaction the game offers. Every swing feels so smooth, and every blow lands with such weight that even the most well-polished games in the genre can barely hold a flame to the deity-infused action of Hades .

  • Open-world exploration on another level.
  • Makes other games feel too samey.

Breath of the Wild brought Zelda back in the most extravagant way possible and also fundamentally altered the course of the open-world genre forever. Hyrule is beautiful and awe-inspiring, with little to no limits on where you can go or how you explore it, meaning that distant landmarks and structures across the landscape become the main sources of guidance in your quest to stop Ganon.

The game's blueprint has since been used to great effect by other industry titans like Elden Ring , but when compared to more old-fashioned open-world games, the excitement and joy are never as high. I have no problem playing a more laid-back game that isn't as focused on this kind of organic style of gameplay, yet there is always a thought in the back of my mind that wishes I were back playing BotW for the very first time.

It's just you and the blade, and with next to no handholding, your path throughout the story is solely dependent on whether you can "get good" and become a master of deflects.

I consider the gameplay in Sekiro to be among the best the gaming world has ever produced. Whenever I jump around to other soulslikes or even hack-and-slash games, there is an inescapable void that can only be filled by yet another duel with Genichiro. Also, when it comes to Eastern-inspired action games, whenever a new trailer drops or a new title is released, many players are quick to compare it to Sekiro , and to ultimately say that the new product is far from the magnum opus that FromSoftware created.

Baldur's Gate 3

The Peak Of RPGs

  • Cinematic presentation with turn-based gameplay.

Baldur's Gate 3 introduced a whole generation of players to the world of CRPGs and gave countless longtime fans a new favorite game that they could easily get lost in for hundreds of hours. Those opening scenes will forever be among my most memorable. As the world opened up, I quickly realized I was experiencing something special firsthand that was unlike anything I had seen in the RPG genre.

The combination of cinematic cutscenes and role-playing freedom ensures that you are constantly immersed from start to finish, and even if you manage to venture all the way to the credits, there are always dozens of more paths to explore in a second, third, or fourth playthrough. As someone who has been a longtime turn-based RPG fan, I find it hard to imagine another game coming along and matching the quality of BG3 , unless Larian is capable of actual witchcraft with the release of the next Divinity .

DOOM Eternal

Singleplayer Shooter Excellence

  • Top-tier boomer shooter design.
  • Faster and more impactful than almost every other release after it.

DOOM Eternal is easily the best game in the entire franchise, and I also think that within the wider shooter genre, it is the best single-player FPS out there. The gunplay is unreal, spearheaded by the constant need to swap weapons and tactically use specific firearms to take down various demons, adding an extra layer of rhythm to an already momentum-heavy game.

The set pieces are another component that really wows you throughout your journey into hell, with entire cities and castles towering above you, each housing an endless swarm of enemies ready to be annihilated. Though The Dark Ages brings a lot of great elements to the series, I still think that if you are looking for a single-player shooter to completely blow everything else out of the water, then no other game makes sense than Eternal .

Hollow Knight

Might As Well Be Called "Knightvania" At This Point

  • The new king of Metroidvanias.
  • Aesthetics and gameplay changed the course of the genre.

Metroidvanias have evolved a lot over the years, going from simple platformers to mind-blowing environments coated in beauty, and the game that has made the biggest jump of them all is Hollow Knight . It is impossible to talk about all the good things the game has to offer. It doesn't matter if you are looking at the combat, movement, or the universe itself; every single element is flawless from start to finish.

Additionally, the game has had such a big influence on the genre that many other developers are attempting to recreate both the art style and gameplay approach, though very few have hit the same benchmark. For me, the game is actually hard to recommend, as once all is said and done, the sensation of emptiness is beyond suffocating. Thankfully, we finally have Silksong to enjoy, even if it doesn't quite live up to its predecessor's name.

Counter-Strike

Igniting A Tactical Wave

  • Birthed a new kind of shooter.
  • Follow-ups that retained the throne.

FPS games have always been split into many different categories, and tactical shooters have always been among the biggest. However, no matter how many new games launch and how much innovation is brought to the table, it is impossible to topple the titan that is Counter-Strike .

The original game pioneered the tactical genre as it exists today, and even after several iterations and new releases, that initial gameplay loop and design philosophy still exists in CS2 . I have bounced around from Valorant to Rainbow 6 to smaller releases that have come and gone, but they are always missing something that can only be produced by Valve's competitive masterpiece.

item.title: Roblox Hyaku Asura Codes (June 2026)
item.description:
In Hyaku Asura , you step into a fast-paced combat world where every fight tests your timing, combos, and ability to adapt against increasingly tough enemies. You’ll train your character, unlock new abilities, and push through intense battles as you try to become stronger with every encounter.

Since early progression can feel slow, redeemable codes are a great way to boost your start by giving EC and useful items like Apples for upgrades and survival. Below you’ll find all the active Hyaku Asura codes you can use right now.

Updated June 24, 2026, by Artur Novichenko: There is currently one active code available, offering EC currency and Apples as a reward. While the list is very small right now, the bonus can still be useful for early progression and resource gathering. Since it’s the only code available, it’s worth redeeming while it remains active. More codes may be added in future updates or events. Be sure to check back later for new rewards and future code updates.

All Hyaku Asura Codes

Working Hyaku Asura Codes

  • WhoisJennna - 2,000 EC and 50 Apple (NEW) [COPY]

Expired Hyaku Asura Codes

Free Week!

25,000 Yen and 3,000 EC (NEW)

They delayed it again???

500,000 Yen and 20,000 EC (NEW)

SorryForRicardo

20,000 Yen and 5,000 EC (NEW)

BalancePatch

20,000 Yen and 5,000 EC (NEW)

ABCDESHUTDOWN

10,000 Yen

Shutdown Asura

50,000 Yen and 500 EC

ThanksFor1kPlayers

2000 EC

Wave0

5000 Yen

Eevee

5000 Yen

Promo codes are a big deal in Hyaku Asura because they hand you free Yen and EC without you having to grind for hours. Yen lets you buy training gear, special items, or even better spots to rest and level up faster. EC is that extra currency that helps with special moves or quick upgrades.

Imagine starting a new session and already having thousands of Yen in your pocket – you can buy what you need right away and spend more time actually fighting instead of saving up.

How to Redeem Hyaku Asura Codes

  • Join the official Roblox community of the game.
  • Open Hyaku Asura on Roblox and make sure you’re inside the game world.
  • Press the M key on your keyboard to bring up the main menu.
  • Click on the Codes tab that pops up.
  • Carefully type or paste one of the working codes into the empty box.
  • Hit the Redeem button and watch your rewards pop up.

How to Get More Hyaku Asura Codes

The devs love sharing new codes with the community, so the easiest way to get new ones is to join the official Discord server. That’s where they drop announcements, sneak peeks, and fresh codes pretty often.

We keep this article fresh with every new code that drops, so popping back here every few days is the smartest move to get more. That way, you never miss a single free reward for this Roblox game, and you stay ahead of everyone else in your fights.

Just bookmark the page and check in – it only takes a second, and you’ll always have the newest working codes ready to go.

Roblox
Released
September 1, 2006

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

ESRB
Teen / Diverse Content: Discretion Advised, In-Game Purchases (Includes Random Items), Users Interact
Genre(s)
Game Creation System
Platform(s)
PlayStation 4, Xbox One, PC, Android, iOS, Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest Pro
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
In Hyaku Asura , you step into a fast-paced combat world where every fight tests your timing, combos, and ability to adapt against increasingly tough enemies. You’ll train your character, unlock new abilities, and push through intense battles as you try to become stronger with every encounter.

Since early progression can feel slow, redeemable codes are a great way to boost your start by giving EC and useful items like Apples for upgrades and survival. Below you’ll find all the active Hyaku Asura codes you can use right now.

Updated June 24, 2026, by Artur Novichenko: There is currently one active code available, offering EC currency and Apples as a reward. While the list is very small right now, the bonus can still be useful for early progression and resource gathering. Since it’s the only code available, it’s worth redeeming while it remains active. More codes may be added in future updates or events. Be sure to check back later for new rewards and future code updates.

All Hyaku Asura Codes

Working Hyaku Asura Codes

  • WhoisJennna - 2,000 EC and 50 Apple (NEW) [COPY]

Expired Hyaku Asura Codes

Free Week!

25,000 Yen and 3,000 EC (NEW)

They delayed it again???

500,000 Yen and 20,000 EC (NEW)

SorryForRicardo

20,000 Yen and 5,000 EC (NEW)

BalancePatch

20,000 Yen and 5,000 EC (NEW)

ABCDESHUTDOWN

10,000 Yen

Shutdown Asura

50,000 Yen and 500 EC

ThanksFor1kPlayers

2000 EC

Wave0

5000 Yen

Eevee

5000 Yen

Promo codes are a big deal in Hyaku Asura because they hand you free Yen and EC without you having to grind for hours. Yen lets you buy training gear, special items, or even better spots to rest and level up faster. EC is that extra currency that helps with special moves or quick upgrades.

Imagine starting a new session and already having thousands of Yen in your pocket – you can buy what you need right away and spend more time actually fighting instead of saving up.

How to Redeem Hyaku Asura Codes

  • Join the official Roblox community of the game.
  • Open Hyaku Asura on Roblox and make sure you’re inside the game world.
  • Press the M key on your keyboard to bring up the main menu.
  • Click on the Codes tab that pops up.
  • Carefully type or paste one of the working codes into the empty box.
  • Hit the Redeem button and watch your rewards pop up.

How to Get More Hyaku Asura Codes

The devs love sharing new codes with the community, so the easiest way to get new ones is to join the official Discord server. That’s where they drop announcements, sneak peeks, and fresh codes pretty often.

We keep this article fresh with every new code that drops, so popping back here every few days is the smartest move to get more. That way, you never miss a single free reward for this Roblox game, and you stay ahead of everyone else in your fights.

Just bookmark the page and check in – it only takes a second, and you’ll always have the newest working codes ready to go.

Roblox
Released
September 1, 2006

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

ESRB
Teen / Diverse Content: Discretion Advised, In-Game Purchases (Includes Random Items), Users Interact
Genre(s)
Game Creation System
Platform(s)
PlayStation 4, Xbox One, PC, Android, iOS, Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest Pro
Powered by

item.title: MeChat Codes (June 2026)
item.description:
What makes MeChat different from most mobile games is that your choices actually shape the story. Instead of fighting enemies or building a base, you chat with dozens of unique characters, unlock romantic storylines, and discover different endings depending on the decisions you make. Every new conversation can reveal secrets, create drama, or lead to unexpected relationships.

Since premium choices and extra interactions often require gems, redeemable codes are a great way to stock up on useful rewards and keep progressing through your favorite stories. New MeChat codes can appear during events, social media campaigns, and special celebrations, so they're worth grabbing as soon as they become available. Below you'll find all the latest MeChat codes to redeem.

Updated June 24, 2026, by Artur Novichenko: There are currently no active codes available for MeChat . While there aren't any free rewards to claim right now, new codes may be released during future updates, events, collaborations, or special promotions. Developers can add rewards without much notice, so it's a good idea to check back regularly. Be sure to revisit later for new codes and future updates to the list.

All MeChat Codes

Are There Working MeChat Codes?

At the moment, all MeChat codes have expired. We will update this page as soon as new codes are released.

Expired MeChat Codes

  • AMYESIAGEMS
  • NOZZOMICOSPLAY
  • REDFLAGS
  • MATCHME
  • DREAMDATE
  • SWIPEFUN
  • CUPID30
  • DREAMDATE
  • HEARTS100
  • ROMANCE50
  • CHATBOOST

As befits a dating sim, MeChat is more about reading and making choices than about resource grinding. However, you'll need to accumulate Gems in various ways. These are the primary currencies used to purchase choices and other important bonuses. Therefore, if you spend them, you'll have to pause the story and grind. To avoid this, you should use MeChat codes.

These codes are a great source of free Gems in this mobile game. Even a few of them are enough to earn over 300 Gems. Furthermore, some codes grant premium choices, which can usually be purchased with real money. This way, you can enjoy episodes without interruption. However, if you delay using them, the codes will expire, and the rewards will become unavailable.

How to Redeem MeChat Codes

Now that you know how valuable the rewards in MeChat codes are, you'll want to know how to use them. This is quite easy to do, as the code redemption feature works extremely simply and has no unlocking requirements. Just follow these steps:

  • Launch MeChat .
  • Next, click the Diamond at the bottom of the screen and scroll down.
  • You should find the Free Gems section and select the "Receive the gift" option.
  • Then enter the code in the corresponding box and tap "Apply" to claim the rewards.

How to Get More MeChat Codes

To be the first to receive all the latest MeChat codes, you should bookmark this guide. We will update it over time as the developers release more free goodies. You can also visit the developers' official page:

  • MeChat Facebook page

MeChat is available on mobile devices.
item.content:encoded:
What makes MeChat different from most mobile games is that your choices actually shape the story. Instead of fighting enemies or building a base, you chat with dozens of unique characters, unlock romantic storylines, and discover different endings depending on the decisions you make. Every new conversation can reveal secrets, create drama, or lead to unexpected relationships.

Since premium choices and extra interactions often require gems, redeemable codes are a great way to stock up on useful rewards and keep progressing through your favorite stories. New MeChat codes can appear during events, social media campaigns, and special celebrations, so they're worth grabbing as soon as they become available. Below you'll find all the latest MeChat codes to redeem.

Updated June 24, 2026, by Artur Novichenko: There are currently no active codes available for MeChat . While there aren't any free rewards to claim right now, new codes may be released during future updates, events, collaborations, or special promotions. Developers can add rewards without much notice, so it's a good idea to check back regularly. Be sure to revisit later for new codes and future updates to the list.

All MeChat Codes

Are There Working MeChat Codes?

At the moment, all MeChat codes have expired. We will update this page as soon as new codes are released.

Expired MeChat Codes

  • AMYESIAGEMS
  • NOZZOMICOSPLAY
  • REDFLAGS
  • MATCHME
  • DREAMDATE
  • SWIPEFUN
  • CUPID30
  • DREAMDATE
  • HEARTS100
  • ROMANCE50
  • CHATBOOST

As befits a dating sim, MeChat is more about reading and making choices than about resource grinding. However, you'll need to accumulate Gems in various ways. These are the primary currencies used to purchase choices and other important bonuses. Therefore, if you spend them, you'll have to pause the story and grind. To avoid this, you should use MeChat codes.

These codes are a great source of free Gems in this mobile game. Even a few of them are enough to earn over 300 Gems. Furthermore, some codes grant premium choices, which can usually be purchased with real money. This way, you can enjoy episodes without interruption. However, if you delay using them, the codes will expire, and the rewards will become unavailable.

How to Redeem MeChat Codes

Now that you know how valuable the rewards in MeChat codes are, you'll want to know how to use them. This is quite easy to do, as the code redemption feature works extremely simply and has no unlocking requirements. Just follow these steps:

  • Launch MeChat .
  • Next, click the Diamond at the bottom of the screen and scroll down.
  • You should find the Free Gems section and select the "Receive the gift" option.
  • Then enter the code in the corresponding box and tap "Apply" to claim the rewards.

How to Get More MeChat Codes

To be the first to receive all the latest MeChat codes, you should bookmark this guide. We will update it over time as the developers release more free goodies. You can also visit the developers' official page:

  • MeChat Facebook page

MeChat is available on mobile devices.
